positive: A stylized, minimalist cosmic animal silhouette, featuring a playful, chunky fox integrated with astronomical elements like swirling nebulae and crescent moons. The fox is leaping through a vibrant, deep indigo and cyan galaxy field, leaving a trail of glowing stardust. Use high-contrast linework, reminiscent of retro sci-fi posters, with areas of negative space giving it a clean, graphic feel. The composition should be centered and visually balanced for apparel printing. Studio lighting setup, ultra-detailed vector art quality, perfect symmetry, vibrant yet soothing color palette, suitable for screen printing on a soft blank.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low quality, noise, messy, realistic photo, grain, low contrast
